productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Adi Liner Black Blue Flip Flop
description: The adidas Liner slides you into that leisure-bound stride with a simple thong design to hold your foot in place, and a quick-drying EVA upper when things get a little wet and wild.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfortThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and styleBrand mark printed on thongsMidsoleEVA footbed with print for lightweight, stylish comfortDie-cut EVA sole unit for all-day relaxation of the feetGraphics on footbed for stylish lookOutsoleTexture outsole for grip and stabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
